name: Efalizumab
description: Humanized IgG1 kappa isotype monoclonal antibody that binds to human CD11a. Efalizumab has a molecular weight of approximately 150 kilodaltons and is produced in a Chinese hamster ovary mammalian cell expression system in a nutrient medium containing the antibiotic gentamicin.
indication: For the treatment of adult patients with moderate to severe chronic plaque psoriasis, who are candidates for phototherapy or systemic therapy.
mechanismOfAction: Efalizumab binds to CD11a, a subunit of leukocyte function antigen-1 (LFA-1), which is expressed on all leukocytes. As a result efalizumab decreases cell surface expression of CD11a.
pharmacodynamics: Lymphocyte activation and trafficking to skin play a role in the pathophysiology of chronic plaque psoriasis. In psoriatic skin, ICAM-1 cell surface expression is upregulated on endothelium and keratinocytes. Raptiva inhibits the binding of LFA-1 to the intercellular adhesion molecule-1 (ICAM-1), thereby inhibiting the adhesion of leukocytes to other cell types.

interactions.name: Natalizumab
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Efalizumab is combined with Natalizumab.

interactions.name: Pimecrolimus
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Pimecrolimus is combined with Efalizumab.

interactions.name: Tofacitinib
interactions.description: Efalizumab may increase the immunosuppressive activities of Tofacitinib.

interactions.name: Tacrolimus
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Tacrolimus is combined with Efalizumab.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Efalizumab.

interactions.name: Leflunomide
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Efalizumab is combined with Leflunomide.

interactions.name: Fingolimod
interactions.description: Efalizumab may increase the immunosuppressive activities of Fingolimod.

interactions.name: Roflumilast
interactions.description: Roflumilast may increase the immunosuppressive activities of Efalizumab.

interactions.name: Varicella Zoster Vaccine (Live/Attenuated)
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Varicella Zoster Vaccine (Live/Attenuated) can be decreased when used in combination with Efalizumab.
